courses.title: Kropotkin & Mutual Aid
courses.description: Cooperation, survival, working-class care, and socialist practice. Six lessons, free to all.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Course intro — What is mutual aid?
lessons.teaser: An introduction to cooperation beyond capitalist myth-making.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Mutual Aid vs Social Darwinism
lessons.teaser: Nature is not a war of all against all.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Mutual Aid in Working-Class History
lessons.teaser: Strikes, friendly societies, and solidarity networks.

lessons.title: Lesson 4: Mutual Aid in Aotearoa
lessons.teaser: Hapū, whānau, working-class communities, and cooperative economies.

lessons.title: Lesson 5: The State vs Mutual Aid
Lesson 6: Mutual Aid Now
lessons.teaser: From food banks to tenants unions to climate response.

courses.title: Graeber: Debt, Bullshit Jobs & Direct Democracy
courses.description: Six lessons on debt as a tool of power, why most work is meaningless by design, and how ordinary people build direct democracy. Free, delivered by email.

lessons.title: Course intro — enrol now
lessons.teaser: Six lessons, free by email. Lesson 1: Who was Graeber? Lesson 2: Debt. Lesson 3: Bullshit Jobs. Lesson 4: Bureaucratic violence. Lesson 5: Direct democracy. Lesson 6: Graeber in Aotearoa.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Who was Graeber?
lessons.teaser: Anthropology, anarchism, and seeing the world differently. Delivered by email — subscribe to receive.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Debt — the first 5,000 years
lessons.teaser: How debt was invented as a tool of domination long before capitalism.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Bullshit Jobs
lessons.teaser: Why so much work under capitalism is meaningless by design.

lessons.title: Lesson 4: Bureaucratic violence
lessons.teaser: How paperwork, means-testing, and administration humiliate and exhaust people.

lessons.title: Lesson 5: Direct democracy & prefigurative politics
lessons.teaser: What Occupy Wall Street and other movements actually built.

lessons.title: Lesson 6: Graeber in Aotearoa today
lessons.teaser: Debt, work, bureaucracy, and direct democracy through a New Zealand lens.

courses.title: Gramsci for Aotearoa
courses.description: Power, hegemony, institutions, and counter-power from below. Coming July 2026.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Why read Gramsci now?
lessons.teaser: Free subscribers can read the lesson in the Courses section.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Hegemony
lessons.teaser: Why ruling ideas become ordinary life.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Organic intellectuals
lessons.teaser: Who speaks for the working class and how?
